# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: S3 bucket for user-uploaded files and application backups with secure configuration

Parameters:
  ApplicationRoleName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the IAM role used by the application
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z0-9+=,.@\-_]+'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid IAM role name

  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Description: Suffix for the bucket name (will be prefixed with account ID and region for uniqueness)
    Default: app-storage
    AllowedPattern: '[a-z0-9\-]+'
    ConstraintDescription: Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

Resources:
  StorageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}'
      AccessControl: Private
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref StorageBucketKMSKey
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      LoggingConfiguration:
        DestinationBucketName: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
        LogFilePrefix: storage-bucket-logs/
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: UserUploadsAndBackups
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  StorageBucketKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting the application storage bucket
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableRootAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleUsage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${ApplicationRoleName}'
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext
              - kms:ReEncryptFrom
              - kms:ReEncryptTo
            Resource: '*'

  StorageBucketKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${BucketNameSuffix}-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref StorageBucketKMSKey

  StorageBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref StorageBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${ApplicationRoleName}'
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:GetObjectVersion
              - s3:ListBucketVersions
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt StorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${StorageBucket.Arn}/*'
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt StorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${StorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyIncorrectEncryptionHeader
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${StorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'aws:kms'
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedObjectUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${StorageBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              'Null':
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: 'true'

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}-access-logs'
      AccessControl: LogDeliveryWrite
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: DeleteOldAccessLogs
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: AccessLogging
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: S3ServerAccessLogsPolicy
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/storage-bucket-logs/*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt StorageBucket.Arn
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyAllExceptLogging
            Effect: Deny
            NotPrincipal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
              AWS:
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub '${AccessLogsBucket.Arn}/*'

Outputs:
  StorageBucketName:
    Description: Name of the storage bucket
    Value: !Ref StorageBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StorageBucketName'

  StorageBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the storage bucket
    Value: !GetAtt StorageBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StorageBucketArn'

  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for bucket encryption
    Value: !GetAtt StorageBucketKMSKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KMSKeyArn'

  AccessLogsBucketName:
    Description: Name of the access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-AccessLogsBucketName'
